title: Piano Chord Finder — Detect the Chords in Any Piano Song
lead: Find the chords to any piano song. Play it, capture what’s playing in a tab, or upload a recording — ChordSnap listens and builds an instant, interactive chord sheet. Free, private, in your browser.

title: Chord Identifier — Identify the Chords in Any Song from Audio
lead: Identify the chords in any song from audio. Record it, capture what’s playing, or upload a file — and get the key, tempo, and full chord progression instantly. Free and private, nothing is uploaded.
